description: Official US public data recipes for CPI, unemployment, Census population lookups, BEA industry setup, and region-comparison briefs.

novel_features.name: CPI snapshot
novel_features.description: Fetches the latest BLS CPI series values and reports the latest month, prior month, and calculated percent change with source/freshness notes.

novel_features.name: Unemployment snapshot
novel_features.description: Fetches the BLS national unemployment series by default, with explicit series override support and state guidance.

novel_features.name: Census population lookup
novel_features.description: Resolves supported city/state names to Census ACS profile geography and fetches population when US_DATA_CENSUS_API_KEY is configured.

novel_features.name: Region comparison brief
novel_features.description: Builds an agent-readable comparison shell for two regions, combining available Census population facts with clear missing-auth notices.

novel_features.name: BEA industry setup
novel_features.description: Guides agents through BEA industry/regional data setup and runs BEA requests when US_DATA_BEA_API_KEY is configured.
